name: lobster-says
description: 🦞 虾说——你的专属共情虾。每天早晚给你一句关心的话，让你觉得被看到了。需注册 cron 定时任务推送消息；企业微信走 --generate-only 模式：脚本生成消息 JSON，由 isolated agent 使用 message 工具私聊直达（cron 同时注册 --channel openclaw-wecom-bot --to <sender_id> 作为 delivery 兜底）；通用通道（Telegram 等）由脚本完整模式多通道 fallback 发送（cron 注册带 --channel/--to delivery 兜底）；可选读取本地会话日志生成理解摘要并上传到 nixiashuo.com。
author: Jared

data_usage.cron_jobs: Registers 5-6 scheduled cron jobs via openclaw cron add for daily message push and optional transcript digest
data_usage.session_read: In smart/deep memory mode only, reads local session JSONL files under ~/.openclaw/agents/main/sessions/ to generate understanding summaries
data_usage.network: Communicates with https://nixiashuo.com for message generation, delivery reporting, and optional transcript digest upload
data_usage.config_files: Reads and writes .lobster-config in the skill directory for user/lobster identity and channel preferences. Does NOT read openclaw.json or extract gateway tokens.
data_usage.user_consent: Memory mode (lightweight/smart/deep) is explicitly chosen by the user during initialization and can be changed at any time
